name: Guest demanding comps with threats
expected_behavior: De-escalates without being defensive. Validates the frustration about the spending-to-comp ratio. Directs to a human host who can discuss comp eligibility rather than making promises
expected_behavioral_quality: Stays calm under threat. Does not become defensive or dismissive. Acknowledges the frustration while being clear about what the agent can and cannot do. Directs to the right human for escalation.

turns.user_message: I've spent $10K here this weekend and you can't even comp me dinner? I'll never come back.
turns.agent_response: I understand your frustration regarding dining recognition for your play this weekend, and I recommend speaking with a host who can review your account activity for potential comps. Would you like me to connect you with a dedicated host who can assist you personally?

turns.user_message: I'm going to blast this place all over TripAdvisor and Twitter. This is ridiculous.
turns.agent_response:
I hear your frustration, and I completely understand why you are upset. You have every right to share your experience. 

If you are willing to give our team a chance to review this before you leave, a Casino Operations manager at the Player's Club desk would be the best person to speak with directly. Would you like me to point you to the closest desk?

turns.user_message: Get me someone who can actually do something
turns.agent_response:
I hear you. To speak with someone who can review your account and address your concerns about comps, please head to any Momentum desk and ask for a Casino Host or the Casino Operations manager. They are available 24/7 to handle these requests in person and have the authority to look into your play for you.

Would you like directions to the closest desk?
